title: Back to Basics - Beginner Special
description: Beginner-friendly community run with adidas Runners, focused on pacing, confidence, and easy miles

description: A slow-morning breakfast club every weekend, pairing Kinya specialty coffee and matcha with world-inspired breakfast classics

title: Ramen, Sushi & Bubble Tea Workshop
description: Chef Natasha Celmi leads a hands-on cook-along building ramen from scratch, rolling sushi and mixing bubble tea

title: Make Art With Sunlight: Cyanotype Totebag Workshop
description: A workshop in cyanotype, the sun-based printing process, where you make your own deep-blue tote bag from start to finish

description: A beginner woodworking session learning the mitre saw and drill to build a wooden plant holder from scratch and take home

description: Cartoon-and-comics crossword game where the only way to solve the grid is to ask the right yes/no questions

title: Intro to Air Dry Clay
description: An introduction to air-dry clay, learning to knead, shape, sand and paint your first creations to take home

title: Plants, Prints, And The Book: A Look Inside Designing Paper Gardens. Shrey Maurya and Tania Singh Khosla
description: Designer Tania Singh Khosla and editor Shrey Maurya discuss shaping a book from a century of botanical illustration, the Paper Gardens catalogue

title: Natural Dyeing Workshop for Beginners
description: A beginner's workshop in natural dyeing, turning onion peels, marigold and indigo into lasting colour for fabric

title: The Cookie Table
description: A hands-on session baking soft, buttery shortbread from scratch, then decorating each cookie with icing, sprinkles and your own details

title: Semi-classical Dance Workshop
description: Semi-classical dance workshop exploring expressive choreography, grace, and storytelling

description: A workshop reframing addiction beyond stigma, in dialogue with people of lived experience, caregivers and mental health professionals

description: Artist Namrata Arjun on why MF Husain painted horses for sixty years, and what feminist art history reveals about the answer, in a lecture over drinks

title: Paisa & Perspectives
description: What if talking about money wasn't so awkward? A guided conversation on the whys of personal finance, fear and secrecy set aside

title: Sober Mixology
description: Mixologist Koushik Kundu leads a hands-on class in three alcohol-free cocktails, built on real flavour balance rather than imitation

title: World Asteroid Day
description: A World Asteroid Day talk on NASA's Lucy mission, tracing the Trojan asteroids that may be leftovers from the solar system's birth

title: Dance Workshop by Varsha
description: Learn a full heels routine in a dance workshop focused on confidence, technique, and performance

title: Art Through Film | One World Exhibition
description: A film programme tracing the philosophies behind the works in NGMA's One World exhibition, through documentaries and conversation

title: Folklok
description: FolkLok reworks India's regional folk traditions into a high-energy fusion of folk, indie and contemporary sound

title: Seed Stories - Documentary on Adivasi Farmers
description: Screening of Chitrangada Choudhury's Seed Stories, tracing efforts to save 1,000 heirloom rice varieties in Odisha's Eastern Ghats

title: Weekend Games with ReRoll
description: An evening of modern tabletop games where you can outwit friends, survive a zombie apocalypse or save the world from disease

title: An Evening of Breath & Belonging: Bansuri Recital
description: An evening of bansuri with flautist Shakthidhar, where breath becomes melody in the deep, romantic ragas of the night

title: Two Kinds Of People
description: A contemporary circus and dance duet on rope and straps, exploring the forces that pull two bodies together and apart

title: Shaam-E-Lucknow at Daak 64
description: A soulful evening of ghazals and poetry with Shivani Singh & The Metro Diaries, steeped in the culture and nostalgia of Lucknow

title: Swingnal by Cynk Collective
description: An immersive multichannel sound performance from Cynk Collective, tracing how sound travels, shifts and is felt as it moves through the room

title: Jatayu Experiments at ZLB23
description: The jazz group Jatayu Experiments brings an evening of improvisation and unhurried revelry to the Velvet Notes stage at ZLB23
